name: ivuorinen-dotfiles
description: ivuorinen's dotfiles, this is for linting and formatters

scripts.lint:usage: bash -c 'rc=0; for f in scripts/*.sh; do usage lint "$f" || rc=1; done; for f in $(grep -rl "#USAGE\|//USAGE" local/bin/ 2>/dev/null | grep -Ev "\.(py|pl|php)$"); do usage lint "$f" || rc=1; done; exit $rc'
scripts.lint: yarn lint:biome && yarn lint:prettier && yarn lint:ec && yarn lint:md-table && yarn lint:markdownlint && yarn lint:v8r && yarn lint:usage
scripts.fix: yarn fix:biome && yarn fix:prettier && yarn fix:md-table

author: Ismo Vuorinen
